title: Acronia zarumae
intro: Acronia zarumae, also known as Zaruma's Acronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress due to its adaptogenic and vasodilatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Acronia zarumae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Acronia zarumae is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used to promote cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
